messages.content:
Hey there, I'm one of these annoyingly backpackers, but I definitely wanna go for the local punk scene in newy when I come over! I found your place with some research. Back home we hosted the band fungas for a show (won't make it to their concert tonight :(...) and yeah I'm just looking for locations that do live music, for punk, garage, fuzz, stoner, metal, Hardcore. In best case local shows.
I would be happy if you could recommend some place to be ð«¶
